parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Montar Contexto').first().json;
return [{ json: { aiResponse: 'Oi! Tive um probleminha técnico. Pode repetir?', phoneNumber: ctx.phoneNumber, conversationId: ctx.conversationId, pushName: ctx.pushName, messageText: ctx.messageText } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ summary: $json.eventTitle, description: $json.eventDesc, start: { dateTime: $json.startISO + '-03:00', timeZone: 'America/Sao_Paulo' }, end: { dateTime: $json.endISO + '-03:00', timeZone: 'America/Sao_Paulo' }, conferenceData: { createRequest: { requestId: $json.requestId, conferenceSolutionKey: { type: 'hangoutsMeet' } } } }) }}
